data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Utilizes encryption to ensure data confidentiality both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Provides an additional layer of security for user accounts via 2FA.
data.technical_spec: Integration with apps like Authy and Google Authenticator.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Incentivizes security researchers to report vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Managed through platforms like HackerOne or Bugcrowd.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Incident Response
data.description: Continuous monitoring and incident protocols to handle security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Application of SIEM systems such as Splunk or IBM QRadar.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular audits to identify and fix security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: In-depth penetration tests and audits by cybersecurity firms.
